mapper.select: SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT IVHD.BUYER_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , IVHD.DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , IVHD.PROGRESS_CD , IVGH.INV_NUM , IVGH.SEND_DATE , IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE ,(CASE WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE ='PI' THEN TO_CHAR(IVGH.SEND_DATE + 14, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ELSE TO_CHAR(IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE + 14, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END) AS SEND_REQ_DATE ,(CASE WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE ='PI' THEN ( CASE WHEN SYSDATE - IVGH.SEND_DATE > 0 THEN ( (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') - ( (IVGH.SEND_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE 0 END ) ELSE ( CASE WHEN SYSDATE - IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE > 0 THEN ( (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') - ( (IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE 0 END ) END) AS LAPSE_DAY ,(CASE WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'PI' THEN IVGH.SUBJECT ||' ('||IVGH.INV_NUM||')' ELSE '부분검수 '|| '('||IVGH.INV_NUM||')' END) AS SUBJECT , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID AS USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM , POHD.VENDOR_CD AS VENDOR_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM -- 2023.03.14 : 검수요청 지연에 대한 SMS 수수료 추가 , CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO , CVUR.DEPT_CD AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID AS RECV_USER_ID , 'SMS_INV_BATCH_PRC' '@@' IVGH.GATE_CD '@@' CUST.CUST_CD '@@' IVGH.INV_NUM AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCIVGH IVGH JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND CVUR.USER_ID = POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID) JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (CUST.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND CUST.CUST_CD = CVUR.COMPANY_CD) WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVHD.SIGN_STATUS IS NULL AND IVHD.SIGN_VALUE IS NOT NULL AND IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE IN ('PI', 'DI') AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('100', '200') AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.LAPSE_DAY = '8' ORDER BY A.INV_NUM

SELECT A.* , CVUR.DEPT_CD AS BRC FROM ( SELECT IVHD.GATE_CD , IVHD.BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , IVHD.DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , IVHD.PROGRESS_CD , IVGH.INV_NUM , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY IVGH.INV_NUM ORDER BY IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD DESC) AS RN ,(CASE WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'PI' THEN IVGH.SUBJECT ||' ('||IVGH.INV_NUM||')' ELSE '부분검수 '|| '('||IVGH.INV_NUM||')' END) AS SUBJECT , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , IVGH.PO_NUM , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , IVHD.INV_DATE ,(CASE WHEN SYSDATE - IVHD.INV_DATE > 0 THEN ((SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') - ((IVHD.INV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE 0 END) AS LAPSE_DAY , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM , IVGH.PAY_CNT , IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE , IVHD.REG_USER_ID AS RECV_USER_ID , IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_NM , IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM , IVPC.AP_USER_ID , GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , IVGH.VENDOR_USER_NM AS USER_NM , IVGH.VENDOR_CELL_NUM AS CELL_NUM -- 2023.03.14 : 검수요청 지연에 대한 SMS 수수료 추가 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = IVPC.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , 'SMS_AP_BATCH_PRC' '@@' IVGH.GATE_CD '@@' IVGH.INV_NUM AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCIVGH IVGH LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND POPY.DEPT_CD = POHD.DEPT_CD AND POPY.VENDOR_CD = POHD.VENDOR_CD AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVGH.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVPC IVPC ON (IVPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVPC.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND IVPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVAP IVAP ON (IVAP.GATE_CD = IVPC.GATE_CD AND IVAP.BUYER_CD = IVPC.BUYER_CD AND IVAP.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVAP.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND IVAP.DEPT_CD = IVHD.DEPT_CD AND IVAP.PAY_CNT = IVPC.PAY_CNT AND IVAP.PY_BUYER_CD = IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD AND IVAP.PY_DEPT_CD = IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD AND IVAP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND IVAP.SIGN_STATUS IS NULL AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = (CASE WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' THEN '300' WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'PI' THEN '700' ELSE IVHD.PROGRESS_CD END) AND IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE IN ('PI', 'DI') ) A JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (A.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND A.AP_USER_ID = CVUR.USER_ID) WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.LAPSE_DAY = '8' AND A.RN = '1'
